title: Annual ACE Bioinformatics Symposium 2024
description: Join us for our flagship annual symposium bringing together bioinformatics researchers, students, and industry partners from across Africa. The event features keynote presentations, research talks, poster sessions, and networking opportunities.
excerpt: Our annual gathering of bioinformatics experts and students from across Africa.

title: Introduction to Machine Learning Workshop
description: A hands-on three-day workshop introducing participants to machine learning concepts and applications. Participants will learn to build and evaluate machine learning models using Python and popular libraries like scikit-learn and TensorFlow.
excerpt: Learn the fundamentals of machine learning in this practical workshop.

title: Genomic Data Analysis Training Course
description: This intensive two-week course covers essential skills for analyzing next-generation sequencing data. Topics include quality control, alignment, variant calling, and functional annotation. Participants will work with real genomic datasets and learn to use standard bioinformatics tools.
excerpt: Comprehensive training in analyzing next-generation sequencing data.

title: Data Visualization Seminar
description: A one-day seminar exploring best practices in data visualization for scientific communication. Learn to create compelling visual representations of complex data using R and Python visualization libraries.
excerpt: Master the art of communicating data through effective visualizations.

title: HPC User Training Session
description: Learn how to effectively use the ACE HPC cluster for your research. This session covers cluster access, job submission, software modules, and best practices for running computational jobs.
excerpt: Get started with high-performance computing at ACE.

title: Guest Lecture: AI in Healthcare
description: Distinguished guest speaker Prof. Jane Smith from University of Cambridge will present on applications of artificial intelligence in healthcare, including diagnostic tools, drug discovery, and personalized medicine.
excerpt: Special lecture on artificial intelligence applications in healthcare.

title: African Bioinformatics Network Meeting 2024
description: Regional meeting of the African Bioinformatics Network bringing together researchers, educators, and students to discuss collaborative opportunities, share research findings, and plan future initiatives.
excerpt: Regional gathering of the African Bioinformatics Network community.

title: Python for Bioinformatics Workshop
description: A practical five-day workshop teaching Python programming specifically for bioinformatics applications. Participants will learn to manipulate biological sequences, parse data files, and automate bioinformatics workflows.
excerpt: Learn Python programming for bioinformatics applications.
